'''√h-j-j''' ('''hajaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debamboozle|debamboozle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debamboozle|debamboozle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-j-j
|-
! Lemma
| hajaja
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || hajajithi || hajajiji || hajajishi || hajaji
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || hajajuthuth || hajajujuj || hajajushush || hajaj
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || hajajuthu || hajajuju || hajajushu || hajaju
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || hajajufuth || hajajufuj || hajajufush || hajajuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || hajajethe || hajajeje || hajajeshe || hajaje
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || hajajothoth || hajajojoj || hajajoshosh || hajaj
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || hajajotho || hajajojo || hajajosho || hajajo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || hajajofoth || hajajofoj || hajajofosh || hajajof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hajajïf || hajajïf || hajajïf || hajajïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hajajïfïf || hajajïfïf || hajajïfïf || hajajïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hajajïf || hajajïf || hajajïf || hajajïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hajajïf || hajajïf || hajajïf || hajajïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || hajajæthæ || hajajæjæ || hajajæshæ || hajajæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || hajajathath || hajajajaj || hajajashash || hajaj
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || hajajatha || hajajaja || hajajasha || hajaja
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || hajajafath || hajajafaj || hajajafash || hajajaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || hajajasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gohajajasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokihajajasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || hajajnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gohajajnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokihajajnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || hajajshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gohajajnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokihajajshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || hajajroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gohajajnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokihajajroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || hajajmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gohajajnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokihajajmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || hajajsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gohajajnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokihajajsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || hajajngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gohajajnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokihajajngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || hajajyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gohajajnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokihajajyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || hajajyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gohajajnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokihajajyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || hajajnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gohajajnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokihajajnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || hajajnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gohajajnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihajajnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || hajajnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gohajajnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokihajajnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || hajajshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gohajajnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokihajajshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || hajajshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gohajajnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihajajshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || hajajshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gohajajnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokihajajshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || hajajronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gohajajnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokihajajronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || hajajroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gohajajnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokihajajroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || hajajromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gohajajnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokihajajromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || hajajmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gohajajnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokihajajmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || hajajmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gohajajnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokihajajmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || hajajmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gohajajnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihajajmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || hajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || hæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hohajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hohæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohohajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohohæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nühajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nühæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünühajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünühæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïhajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïhæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïhajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïhæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luhajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luhæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluhajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluhæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lihajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lihæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilihajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilihæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kohajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kohæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokohajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokohæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kehajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kehæjæj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekehajaj
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekehæjæj
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
